title: Amtech L4250 2 Piece Mains Tester
features: 200 - 250V RANGE: These quality mains tester have a 200 - 250V testing range
SAFE: They have a one-piece slotted blade with an insulated sheath and a transparent plastic handle for maximum safety
POCKET CLIP: 125mm (5") and 175mm (7") in length, these mains testing screwdrivers also have a handy pocket clip
WIDE APPLICATION: Useful for a range of repair, assembly, and maintenance jobs
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee.
